prompt: A rain-slicked empty parking lot at night under a single cold white security light. Steel blue-grey tones dominating. Wet asphalt reflecting the light in a harsh pool. Fog or mist at the edges of the frame. A single car parked far away, barely visible. The overall feeling is surveillance — cold, observed, institutional. 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
